title: String, binary, and I/O BIFs — remaining sample workflow coverage
purpose: The sample workflow imports string operations (find, next_grapheme, pad, replace, slice), binary encoding (hex, base64), and I/O functions (put_chars, format) that are not yet implemented. These are needed for Gleam's string processing, output formatting, and binary encoding pipelines.
task: Implement 16 BIFs across the string, binary, base64, io, io_lib, and init modules.
boundaries: SHALL NOT implement full Erlang format string parsing for io:format — support ~s, ~p, ~w, ~n only
SHALL NOT implement io:setopts beyond returning ok (stub)
SHALL route io:put_chars through a configurable output sink (trait/callback), not directly to stdout — default is no-op, beamr-cli sets stdout

requirements.title: string module BIFs (5 functions)
requirements.spec: Register under string module: find/2, next_grapheme/1, pad/4, replace/4, slice/3.

requirements.title: I/O BIFs with configurable output sink (5 functions)
requirements.spec: Define IoSink trait with write(&self, bytes: &[u8]). Default NullSink (no-op), beamr-cli sets StdoutSink. Register io:put_chars/1, io:put_chars/2, io:format/3, io:setopts/2 (stub ok), io_lib:format/2.

requirements.title: init:stop/1
requirements.spec: Register init:stop/1 — accepts exit code integer, sets shutdown flag, returns ok.
